assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message is too generic and misses the signal context.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?

objections.objection: I see you did your homework. Immediate question: payment chain, documents, KYC — what's in your scope, what's not?
Too many declarations. What specifically changes in my process, and in what timeframe?
Ok. Send me a brief written summary: payment flow, audit story, scope boundary. If it's concrete, I'll do a 20-minute call.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.evidence_quote: Specifically on cost, Mellow covers KYC, contractor docs, and the payment chain with audit trail on our side. Which part do you want more precision on?
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
I see you did your homework. Immediate question: payment chain, documents, KYC — what's in your scope, what's not?
Where is the weakest point today: documents, payout flow, or status control?
Too many declarations. What specifically changes in my process, and in what timeframe?
Specifically on cost, Mellow covers KYC, contractor docs, and the payment chain with audit trail on our side. Which part do you want more precision on?
Ok. Send me a brief written summary: payment flow, audit story, scope boundary. If it's concrete, I'll do a 20-minute call.
